heading: Federal reserve banks; title
label: 225 Federal reserve banks; title
text: A Federal reserve bank shall include in its title the name of the city in which it is situated, as “Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago.”
notes: CodificationSection is based on part of the second par. of section 2 of act . The rest of the second par. was not included in the Code. For classification of other pars. of section 2 of this Act, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 1913section 222 of this title
